Operation 'createVirtualCard' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too minimal. Added clarity on expected inputs (customer details), outputs (card details returned), and side effects (card becomes active). This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in response.

data.current_description: Issues a new virtual card for a customer.
data.description_suggestion: Issues a new virtual card for a customer. Accepts customer details including name, email, and card preferences. Returns the created virtual card object containing card number, expiry date, CVV, and card status. The card is immediately active and ready for use upon creation.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Added clarity on expected inputs (customer details), outputs (card details returned), and side effects (card becomes active). This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in response.

message: Operation 'fundVirtualCard' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about funding source, required parameters, return values, and balance implications. Enhanced version clarifies the funding mechanism (from merchant wallet), required inputs (card ID, amount), outputs (updated balance, transaction confirmation), and side effects (wallet debit).

data.current_description: Adds funds to a virtual card balance.
data.description_suggestion: Adds funds to a virtual card balance by transferring from the merchant's wallet. Requires the virtual card ID and funding amount. Returns the updated card balance and transaction confirmation. The merchant's wallet balance is debited accordingly.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about funding source, required parameters, return values, and balance implications. Enhanced version clarifies the funding mechanism (from merchant wallet), required inputs (card ID, amount), outputs (updated balance, transaction confirmation), and side effects (wallet debit).

data.current_description: Retrieves all sub-accounts for a business.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all sub-accounts associated with a specified business. Requires the business ID as a path parameter. Returns a paginated list of sub-account objects containing account details, status, and balance information for each sub-account.
data.reasoning: Current description is incomplete. Added clarity on required parameter (business ID), pagination context, and what sub-account details are returned. This helps AI agents understand the scope of data returned and how to handle pagination.

data.current_description: Creates a subsidiary account for a business.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new sub-account under a specified business. Requires the business ID and sub-account details including name, email, and account type. Returns the created sub-account object with account ID, status, and initial balance. The sub-account is immediately active and inherits permissions from the parent business.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks essential details about inputs, outputs, and state changes. Enhanced version specifies required parameters (business ID, account details), return values (account object with ID and status), and side effects (sub-account becomes active with inherited permissions). This enables AI agents to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

data.current_description: Converts one supported currency to another.

data.current_description: Verifies bank verification numbers (Nigeria).
data.description_suggestion: Verifies a Nigerian Bank Verification Number (BVN) against the Central Bank of Nigeria registry. Accepts a BVN string as input and returns verification status along with associated account holder information if valid. Used for identity verification and KYC compliance. Verification results are cached for subsequent requests with the same BVN.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity. Enhanced to clarify the geographic scope (Nigeria), the verification source (CBN registry), expected inputs (BVN string), outputs (status and holder info), and side effects (caching).
